---
title: "Journeys"
---

# Journeys

Between 2015 and 2018, I investigated natural resources damage cases across China.

Each investigation began as a scientific assessment.

Each eventually became a reflection on the relationship between ecology, institutions, and human decisions.

---

## Explore the Cases

- [When Forests Become Mines](inner-mongolia.qmd)
- 🟢 Beijing — *The Disappearance of a Wetland*
- 🟢 Hainan — *Where Silence Once Belonged to Birds*
- 🟢 Qinghai — *Scars on the Plateau*
- 🟢 Guizhou — *The Hidden Cost of Renewable Energy*
- 🟢 Dongguan — *The Forest at the Edge of Industry*
